languages.text: "...418, 419, 420. Бог-Император, глазам своим не верю. Еда, да не откуда-то, а аж с самого Януса".
"...418, 419, 420. God-Emperor, I can't believe my eyes. Provisions, and not just from anywhere, but straight from Janus itself."
languages.original_text: "...418, 419, 420. Бог-Император, глазам своим не верю. Еда, да не откуда-то, а аж с самого Януса".

traits.locale_text: "...418, 419, 420. God-Emperor, I can't believe my eyes. Provisions, and not just from anywhere, but straight from Janus itself."
"...418, 419, 420. God-Emperor, I can't believe my eyes. Provisions, and not just from anywhere, but straight from Janus itself."
"...418, 419, 420. God-Emperor, I can't believe my eyes. Provisions, and not just from anywhere, but straight from Janus itself."
"...418, 419, 420. God-Emperor, I can't believe my eyes. Provisions, and not just from anywhere, but straight from Janus itself."

languages.text: «... 418, 419, 420. Dios Emperador, no me puedo creer lo que veo. Provisiones, y no precisamente cualquier cosa. Vienen directamente de Janus».
languages.original_text: "...418, 419, 420. God-Emperor, I can't believe my eyes. Provisions, and not just from anywhere, but straight from Janus itself."

traits.locale_text: «... 418, 419, 420. Dios Emperador, no me puedo creer lo que veo. Provisiones, y no precisamente cualquier cosa. Vienen directamente de Janus».

languages.text: “……418，419，420。神皇啊，我真不敢相信自己的眼睛。补给品，还不是从别处运来的，是直接从加努斯送来的！”
languages.original_text: "...418, 419, 420. God-Emperor, I can't believe my eyes. Provisions, and not just from anywhere, but straight from Janus itself."

traits.locale_text: “……418，419，420。神皇啊，我真不敢相信自己的眼睛。补给品，还不是从别处运来的，是直接从加努斯送来的！”

languages.text: "... 418, 419, 420. Gottimperator, ich traue meinen Augen nicht. Vorräte, aber nicht von irgendwo, sondern von Janus selbst."
languages.original_text: "...418, 419, 420. God-Emperor, I can't believe my eyes. Provisions, and not just from anywhere, but straight from Janus itself."

traits.locale_text: "... 418, 419, 420. Gottimperator, ich traue meinen Augen nicht. Vorräte, aber nicht von irgendwo, sondern von Janus selbst."

languages.text: « ... 418, 419, 420. Ô Empereur-Dieu, je n'en crois pas mes yeux. Des tas de provisions, en provenance de Janus elle-même, qui plus est. »
languages.original_text: "...418, 419, 420. God-Emperor, I can't believe my eyes. Provisions, and not just from anywhere, but straight from Janus itself."

traits.locale_text: « ... 418, 419, 420. Ô Empereur-Dieu, je n'en crois pas mes yeux. Des tas de provisions, en provenance de Janus elle-même, qui plus est. »

languages.text: "418, 419, 420. Tanrı İmparator aşkına, gözlerime inanamıyorum. Erzak... Hem de öyle herhangi bir yerden değil, doğrudan Janus'tan."
languages.original_text: "...418, 419, 420. God-Emperor, I can't believe my eyes. Provisions, and not just from anywhere, but straight from Janus itself."

traits.locale_text: "418, 419, 420. Tanrı İmparator aşkına, gözlerime inanamıyorum. Erzak... Hem de öyle herhangi bir yerden değil, doğrudan Janus'tan."

languages.text: 「…418、419、420。神皇帝、信じられない。食料、しかもどこからではなく、ジャヌス直送のものだ。」
languages.original_text: "...418, 419, 420. God-Emperor, I can't believe my eyes. Provisions, and not just from anywhere, but straight from Janus itself."

traits.locale_text: 「…418、419、420。神皇帝、信じられない。食料、しかもどこからではなく、ジャヌス直送のものだ。」
